Paragraph 36; the Assurance may be executed in counterparts, each of which shall be deemed to be an original, but all of which, taken together, shall constitute one and the same agreement.

The NYAG shall release and discharge Equifax from all claims that the NYAG could have brought based on the OMS Issue. Nothing in paragraph 14 will limit the NYAG's ability to enforce obligations Equifax has under the AOD.
The NYAG shall follow the procedures delineated in section 89(5) of the Public Officers Law.

Default in the performance of any obligation under paragraphs 6 through 14 is a violation of the Assurance; the NYAG thereafter may commence a civil action or proceeding contemplated in paragraph 1, supra, in addition to any other appropriate investigation, action, or proceeding.
